resident_island.attribution: A 137-byte persistent sector fetcher separates the unread source lifetime from C1 compiler-container staging; removal of the former one-byte alignment pad accounts for the reserve arithmetic.

resident_island_installer_slice.attribution: The 137-byte source fetcher is included in the installed island image while consolidation of duplicate installer context checks reclaims 110 bytes; net slice growth is 27 bytes.

other_dimensions.delta: Bank headroom gains 103 bytes; all other listed dimensions are unchanged.

watch_policy.resident_island: watch-listed at 120 bytes reserve; every future capacity_delta must state its island delta explicitly
watch_policy.wave_1_1_m: The transactional FASL-save probe must measure and report all resident-island demand before authorization.

owner_decision: Authorize the exact resident-island reserve repin from 256 to 120 bytes and the resident-island installer-slice repin from the latest 27-byte owner pin to 22 bytes, while preserving the sealed 49-to-22-byte comparison.
rejected_shortcuts: Do not reduce the public 38,400-byte source-load ceiling.
Do not relax the 1,792-byte installer-slice limit.
Do not remove product/build identity or either CRC boundary.
claim_limit: This authorization permits only the measured resident-island and installer-slice repins. It does not prove the canonical varied fresh-clone build, promote product bytes, reuse any G5 receipt, or claim R3/R4/R5/R6/G5/G6 acceptance.
